esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-etcd.otel-default*
// Gauge: open FDs vs max; exhaustion causes connection failures
| WHERE process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
  AND process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
  AND process_max_fds > 0
| EVAL fd_ratio = process_open_fds * 1.0 / process_max_fds
// Alert when usage exceeds 90%; adjust for earlier warning
| WHERE fd_ratio > 0.9
| STATS fd_ratio = MAX(fd_ratio),
    open_fds = MAX(process_open_fds),
    max_fds = MAX(process_max_fds)
    BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT fd_ratio DESC
